heading: Grants and contracts for establishment of regional medical libraries
label: 286b–6 Grants and contracts for establishment of regional medical libraries

children.heading: Existing public or private nonprofit medical libraries
children.label: a Existing public or private nonprofit medical libraries
children.text: The Secretary, with the advice of the Board, shall make grants to and enter into contracts with existing public or private nonprofit medical libraries so as to enable each of them to serve as the regional medical library for the geographical area in which it is located.

children.heading: Uses for grants and contracts
children.label: b Uses for grants and contracts

children.text: acquisition of books, journals, and other similar materials;
cataloging, binding, and other procedures for processing library resource materials for use by those who are served by the library;
acquisition of duplicating devices and other equipment to facilitate the use of the resources of the library by those who are served by it;
acquisition of mechanisms and employment of personnel for the speedy transmission of materials from the regional library to local libraries in the geographic area served by the regional library; and
planning for services and activities under this section.

children.label: A
children.text: to modify and increase their library resources, and to supplement the resources of cooperating libraries in the region, so as to be able to provide adequate supportive services to all libraries in the region as well as to individual users of library services; and

children.label: B
children.text: to provide free loan services to qualified users and make available photoduplicated or facsimile copies of biomedical materials which qualified requesters may retain.

children.label: A
children.text: the adequacy of the library (in terms of collections, personnel, equipment, and other facilities) as a basis for a regional medical library; and

children.label: B
children.text: the size and nature of the population to be served in the region in which the library is located.

children.heading: Basic resources materials; limitation on grant or contract
children.label: d Basic resources materials; limitation on grant or contract

children.text: 50 percent of the library’s annual operating expense (exclusive of Federal financial assistance under this part) for the preceding year; or

in case of the first year in which the library receives a grant under this section for basic resource materials, 50 percent of its average annual operating expenses over the past three years (or if it had been in operation for less than three years, its annual operating expenses determined by the Secretary in accordance with regulations).
